Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello join forces to create New England eats with a New Orleans twist.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril shows you how to make the most of figs.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics.
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril's friends Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.title: New Orleans Coffee
